languages.text: "...и покуда Святая Терра не отзовет меня. {name} фон Валанциус да будет гласом Его, покуда иного не скажет Бог-Император устами Адептус Министорум".
languages.translation_comment: Сначала барк говорит мейнчарактер (Олежкин или Дунаевская), потом его повторяют все собравшиеся гвардейцы

languages.text: "...and until Holy Terra calls me home. {name} von Valancius shall be His voice, until the God-Emperor speaks otherwise through the mouth of the Adeptus Ministorum."
languages.original_text: "...и покуда Святая Терра не отзовет меня. {name} фон Валанциус да будет гласом Его, покуда иного не скажет Бог-Император устами Адептус Министорум".

traits.locale_text: "...and until Holy Terra calls me home. {name} von Valancius shall be His voice, until the God-Emperor speaks otherwise through the mouth of the Adeptus."
"...and until Holy Terra calls me home. {name} von Valancius shall be His voice, until the God-Emperor speaks otherwise through the mouth of the Adeptus."
"...and until Holy Terra calls me home. {name} von Valancius shall be His voice, until the God-Emperor speaks otherwise through the mouth of the Adeptus."

languages.text: 「…そして聖なるテラが私を呼び戻すまで、ヴァランシウス家の{name}が神の御言を伝える。アデプタスの口を通して神帝が異を告げない限り。」
languages.original_text: "...and until Holy Terra calls me home. {name} von Valancius shall be His voice, until the God-Emperor speaks otherwise through the mouth of the Adeptus."

traits.locale_text: 「…そして聖なるテラが私を呼び戻すまで、ヴァランシウス家の{name}が神の御言を伝える。アデプタスの口を通して神帝が異を告げない限り。」

languages.text: “……直至神圣泰拉召唤我归乡。{name}·冯·瓦兰修斯将是祂的代言人，除非神皇通过国教之口另有指示。”
languages.original_text: "...and until Holy Terra calls me home. {name} von Valancius shall be His voice, until the God-Emperor speaks otherwise through the mouth of the Adeptus Ministorum."

traits.locale_text: “……直至神圣泰拉召唤我归乡。{name}·冯·瓦兰修斯将是祂的代言人，除非神皇通过国教之口另有指示。”

languages.text: "... und bis mich das heilige Terra nach Hause ruft. {name} von Valancius soll Seine Stimme sein, bis der Gottimperator durch die Stimme des Adeptus Ministorum anders entscheidet.
languages.original_text: "...and until Holy Terra calls me home. {name} von Valancius shall be His voice, until the God-Emperor speaks otherwise through the mouth of the Adeptus Ministorum."

traits.locale_text: "... und bis mich das heilige Terra nach Hause ruft. {name} von Valancius soll Seine Stimme sein, bis der Gottimperator durch die Stimme des Adeptus Ministorum anders entscheidet.

languages.text: « ... et jusqu'à ce que la Sainte Terra me rappelle. {name} von Valancius sera Sa voix jusqu'à ce que l'Empereur-Dieu révoque ce droit à travers l'Adeptus Ministorum. »
languages.original_text: "...and until Holy Terra calls me home. {name} von Valancius shall be His voice, until the God-Emperor speaks otherwise through the mouth of the Adeptus Ministorum."

traits.locale_text: « ... et jusqu'à ce que la Sainte Terra me rappelle. {name} von Valancius sera Sa voix jusqu'à ce que l'Empereur-Dieu révoque ce droit à travers l'Adeptus Ministorum. »

languages.text: «... hasta que la Sagrada Terra me vuelva a convocar. {name} von Valancius será Su voz hasta que el Dios Emperador decrete lo contrario a través del Adeptus Ministorum».
languages.original_text: "...and until Holy Terra calls me home. {name} von Valancius shall be His voice, until the God-Emperor speaks otherwise through the mouth of the Adeptus Ministorum."

traits.locale_text: «... hasta que la Sagrada Terra me vuelva a convocar. {name} von Valancius será Su voz hasta que el Dios Emperador decrete lo contrario a través del Adeptus Ministorum».

languages.text: "Kutsal Terra beni eve çağırana dek. {name} von Valancius; Tanrı İmparator, Adeptus Ministorum'un ağzından aksini söyleyene kadar O'nun sesi olacaktır."
languages.original_text: "...and until Holy Terra calls me home. {name} von Valancius shall be His voice, until the God-Emperor speaks otherwise through the mouth of the Adeptus Ministorum."

traits.locale_text: "Kutsal Terra beni eve çağırana dek. {name} von Valancius; Tanrı İmparator, Adeptus Ministorum'un ağzından aksini söyleyene kadar O'nun sesi olacaktır."
